entries.title: Track play time live — watch your cost/hr drop in real time
entries.body: Tap '▶ Start Live Session' on any game card to start a real-time timer. A floating bar appears at the bottom of the screen showing your game, a live clock, and your cost-per-hour updating as you play. When you're done, tap Stop, optionally pick a session vibe, and your time is logged automatically. The timer even survives page refreshes, so you can close and reopen the app mid-session.

entries.title: Search your library instantly
entries.body: A search bar now lives at the top of the Games tab. Type a game name, genre, or platform and your list narrows in real time. Works great when you have a big library and just want to find that one game quickly.

entries.title: Updates live here now
entries.body: This is the new What's New panel. When the app changes, you'll see a friendly summary here so you always know what's different.
